snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: Talja (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Deepak Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021| Above All
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents Official Video of Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Talja By Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon From His Debut Album Above All.



Track Credits:
Track Name: Talja
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Female Lead: Navi Brar
Edit & Colour Grading: Gobindpuriya
DOP: Renato Villas
Story/Screenplay: Garry Bhullar Films
Assitant Director: Paramvir
Make Up Artist: Parteek Dhillon
Bike Stunts: MSL Productions
BTS: Gundeep
Directed By: Japjeet Dhillon
Supporting Artists: Param Sandhu, Nirvair Sandhu & Lovely
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Special Thanks: Big Media
Hair Stylist: Varinder 8261
Lyrical Video:  Roop Kamal Singh
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri





Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã



Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã




Talja Lyrics:

Oh baby bass rehando na lado,
mere husan de dushmna naal ,
Ehh jmaana jaalim ha,
te jaalim he rehna aa,
Oye aah kachjiya ambiya ta ma chabb k khaju , 
dekhi chall banda ki alet lene saare mai,
bicho paad du mere saale de,
 
 
Forda de toachan vargi yaari , 
ho peju pind  tere te bhari,
o vigdya jatt te jhota same
Kardu raga cho garmi saari ,
naal jo mere ohh bande agg , 
ptandar lott layinde ne thagg ,
roj da yabb  tu giriya chabb ho,
Dekh njaare ni ,
 
 
la sharta yara tera thoke te bade swaare ni , 
je kahe bna dya scene ma hune dabaare ni,
 
 
O talja o talja o talja talja talja
Talja talja ve badmasha, 
awe hoju koi tamasha ,
ve kato jaan dukhan vich pauni ,
Ve Koi la k rakh du passa ,
katt la rabb toh thoda dar k ,
thode ghot sabar de bharke,
sare pind di akh vich radke  , 
ve fadya jayega , 
awe velly banda banda ragya jayega ,
awe velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
Aah hukam de ike dukke  ni,
tere jatt de muhre fikke ni ,
on flasha hon kude,
rahinde saah vairi de khiche ni  ,
mast aa rahindi  chaal ,
lafdya nal kadiye laal ,
kai takkre  velly  mittra nu, 
sada vinga v na vaal , 
baba naal te khidya maal , 
te aun  hulaare ni ,
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade swaare ni ,
j kahe bna dya scene ma hune dbaare ni,
 
Begaane putt hoye aa juttt , 
ve raat pawayega,
Aah patlo da dil kehnda,
tu att krayega ,
Shant shaant  k pauna,
ve jatta kurte kaale ,
chaklo chaklo kahinde,
jo pattu rakhda naale , 
tu ik te vairi bahle
Mud pachtayega ,
ve tu velly banda banda ragdya jayega
 
 
 
 
Pura tohra dhakad shora ,
ni zigre  bamb kude,
Aah rees jatt di laude,
ni jaane hamb kude
Tohna chakde roj he,
gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

snippet.title: AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA : Sawaal (Official Video) New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Ravi P | Priya S
snippet.description:
AMIT SAINI ROHTAKIYA : Sawaal (Official Video) New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 | Ravi P | Priya S

Music Studio Haryanvi Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sawaal ý§∏ý§µý§æý§≤ ( Official Video ). Another superhit haryanvi song sung by Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Ravi Panchal , Priya Soni & Shivashdeep Jangid. Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Aamin Barodi. The video is directed by Jeetu G.Music Label & Copyrights by Music Studio Haryanvi.

Song : Sawaal ( Official Video )
Singer : Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Starring : Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Ravi Panchal , Priya Soni & Shivashdeep Jangid
Music : GR Music
Lyrics : Aamin Barodi
Director : Jeetu G
Producer : Music Studio Haryanvi
Production Manager : Subham Gambhir
DOP : Munish Sharma
Editor : Romeo Rider 
Production Head : Karan (8447895888)
Music Label & Copyright : Music Studio Haryanvi

Online Promotion : Navi Baadliwal 
https://www.instagram.com/navibaadliwal
Digital Partner : The New Digital Media 
https://www.instagram.com/thenewdigitalmedia

Lyrics :-
Mein tere bina rahluga tu rahlegi ke na,
Mein dard ghane sah lunga tu sahlegi ke na
Mein dard ghane sah lunga tu sahlegi ke na 
Re chalo maan liya gerah ki bahya me jhul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 

Jab hovega ahsas tene kale panka,
Aaj rousu me kaal tubhi rovegi,
Yo pagal sa aave tene yaad itna,
Gulab ki patiya me tohvegi 
Gulab ki patiya me tohvegi 
Are kisi ger ne maan ke apna kabul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu

Tu magegi re mot tane mot na mile
Dard judayi aala sahya jaavena
Aamin barodi Jeeve ghut 
Aamin barodi Jeeve ghut
ke Makha kisite ab kuch kahya jaave na 
ke Makha kisite ab kuch kahya jaave na
Are mere pyaar ka aaj chuka ke mul jaagi tu
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu 
Par khud te to puchh sawaal ke mane bhul jaagi tu

Android: http://bit.ly/BhajanBhaktiApp

Popular Videos
üôèüèª Durga Chalisa Slow Version - https://youtu.be/sPK-FNYvL_s
üôèüèª Durga Amritwani - https://youtu.be/ehohsaAIs2c
üôèüèª Durga Gatha - https://youtu.be/-AoagFfj1ss
üôèüèª Durga Kavach - https://youtu.be/0rjuR_iiUMg
üôèüèª Bhor Bhai Din Chad Gaya - https://youtu.be/NtVk69MSdIo
üôèüèª Jai Ambe Gauri Aarti - https://youtu.be/Kw6J7e8lTDM
üôèüèª Aigiri Nandini - https://youtu.be/BaAhriclAB0

Credits:
Singer: Anuradha Paudwal
Music Director: Navin-Manish
Lyrics: Traditional
Edit & Gfx : Prem Graphics PG
Music Label: Music Nova

Lyrics:
Namo Namo Durge Sukh Karni
Namo Namo Ambe Dukh Harni
Nirakar Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tihun Lok Phaili Ujiyari

Shashi Lalaat Mukh Maha Vishala
Netra Lal Bhrikouti Vikarala
Roop Maatu Ko Adhik Suhave
Darsh Karat Jan Ati Sukh Paave
Tum Sansar Shakti Ley Keena
Palan Hetu Anna Dhan Deena
Annapoorna Hui Jag Paala
Tumhi Aadi Sundari Bala

Pralayakal Sab Nashaan Haari
Tum Gouri Shiv Shankar Pyari
Shiv Yogi Tumhare Gun Gaavein
Brahma Vishnu Tumhein Nit Dhyaave
Roop Saraswati Ko Tum Dhara
De Subuddhi Rishi Munina Ubara
Dhara Roop Narsimha Ko Amba
Pragat Bhayi Phaad Kar Khamba

Raksha Kari Prahlad Bachayo
Hiranyaykush Ko Swarg Pathayo
Lakshmi Roop Dharo Jag Mahin
Shree Narayan Anga Samahin

Ksheer Sindhu Mein Karat Vilaasa
Daya Sindhu Deejey Mann Aasa
Hingalaja Mein Tumhi Bhawani
Mahima Amit Na Jaat Bakhani

Matangi Dhoomawati Mata
Bhuvaneshwari Bagala Sukhdata
Shree Bhairav Tara Jag Tarini
Chhinna Bhala Bhava Dukh Nivarini
Kehari Vahan Sohe Bhawani
Laangur Veer Chalat Agavani
Kar Mein Khappar Khadaga Virajay
Jako Dekh Kaal Darr Bhajey

Sohe Astra Aur Trishula
Jate Uthata Shatru Hiya Shoola

Nagkoti Mein Toumhi Virajat
Tihoun Lok Mein Danka Baajat
Shumbh Nishumbh Daanav Tum Maare
Rakta Beej Shankhana Sanghaare
Mahishasur Nrip Ati Abhimani
Jehi Agh Bhar Mahi Akulaani

Roop Karaal Kali Ka Dhara
Sena Sahita Tum Tihin Samhara
 Padi Peed Santan Par Jab Jab
Bhayi Sahay Maat Tum Tab Tab
Amarpuri Auro Sab Lokaa
Tab Mahima Sab Rahey Ashoka
Jwala Mein Hai Jyoti Tumhari
Tumhein Sada Poojey Nar Nari

Prem Bhakti Se Jo Jas Gaave
Dukh Daridra Nikat Nahin Aave
Dhyave Jo Nar Mann Layi
Janma Maran Tako Chhouti Jaayi
Jogi Sur Muni Kahat Pukaari
Yog Nahi Bina Shakti Tumhari
Shankar Acharaj Tap Kinho
Kaamaru Krodh Jeet Sab Leenho

Nishdin Dhyan Dharo Shankar Ko
Kaahu Kaal Nahin Sumiro Tumko
Shakti Roop Ko Maram Na Paayo
Shakti Gayi Tab Mann Pachitayo
Sharnagat Huyi Kiriti Bakhai
Jai Jai Jai Jagadambe Bhawani

Bhayi Prasanna Aadi Jagadamba
Dayi Shakti Nahin Keen Vilamba

Maukon Maatu Kashta Ati Ghero
Tum Bin Kaun Hare Dukh Mero
Asha Trishna Nipat Satave
Ripu Murakh Mohi Ati Darpave
Shatru Nash Keeje Maharani
Sumiron Ikchit Tumhein Bhawani
Karo Kripa Hey Maatu Dayala
Riddhi Siddhi Dey Karahou Nihaala

Jab Lagi Jiyoun Daya Phal Paun
Tumharo Jas Mein Sada Sunaun
Durga Chalisa Jo Koi Gaavey
Sab Sukh Bhog Parampad Paave

Devidas Sharan Neej Jaani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani
Karahun Krupa Jagadambe Bhawani

Sharanagat Raksha Kare
Bhakt Rahe Nishank
Me Aaya Teri Sharan Mein
Matu Leejiye Ank

Join Us

‚¶ø Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NovaSpiritualIndia
‚¶ø Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nova.spiritual.india
‚¶ø Android App: http://bit.ly/BhajanBhaktiApp
‚¶ø Website:  https://www.medianova.in

#DurgaChalisa #AnuradhaPaudwal #DurgaMaa

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: When you hit Puberty ft. Saloni Gaur & Urvi Singh
snippet.description:
Teenage years are a roller coaster of emotions and drama. Hormonal changes don't just imbalance your physical and hair growth but also your self-confidence. Let's see how Aditi survives puberty when puberty hits her hard LITERALLY!

Hair removal gets a cute makeover thanks to the new Venus Snap. It has soap gel bars that help to get the smoothest glide and skin! And the best part is, this cute case fits in perfectly in the beauty kit. #Girliyapa #GilletteVenusSnap

https://nykaa.ly/P_744588

snippet.description:
Episode 3 goes live as soon as we reach 8.5M Subscribers

Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Having a good teacher is extremely important while preparing for UPSC. Abhilash knows it, but he thinks his teacher is not good enough and wants to leave his current coaching center and find a better one. But his current institute doesn‚Äôt have a fee-return policy. What will Abhilash do now? Will he continue with his current coaching center or will he find a better teacher?

One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here‚Äôs to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series.

Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey

UPSC fact #71: In a village named Bharatpur, Radha, who was married to Heera Thakur, completed her IAS studies after becoming a mother. She left her village to prepare for UPSC, successfully passed the exam, and ended up becoming the collector of her own district. Radha‚Äôs father-in-law Thakur Bhanu Pratap, who previously disowned her and his son Heera because they got married against his will, was so impressed by her achievement that he accepted them.
-The Description Guy.

IPL 2021 ý∞∏ý±Äý∞úý∞®ý±ç, 14ý∞µ ý∞éý∞°ý∞øý∞∑ý∞®ý±ç‚Äåý∞≤ý±ã ý∞∏ý∞®ý±ç‚Äåý∞∞ý±àý∞úý∞∞ý±çý∞∏ý±ç ý∞πý±àý∞¶ý∞∞ý∞æý∞¨ý∞æý∞¶ý±ç ý∞Æý±Åý∞öý±çý∞öý∞üý∞óý∞æ ý∞Æý±Çý∞°ý±ãý∞∏ý∞æý∞∞ý∞ø ý∞ìý∞üý∞Æý∞ø ý∞™ý∞æý∞≤ý±àý∞Çý∞¶ý∞ø. ý∞öý±áý∞§ý∞øý∞ïý∞ø ý∞Öý∞Çý∞¶ý±áý∞Çý∞§ ý∞éý∞§ý±çý∞§ý±Åý∞≤ý±ã ý∞âý∞®ý±çý∞® ý∞≤ý∞ïý±çý∞∑ý±çý∞Øý∞æý∞®ý±çý∞®ý∞ø ý∞õý±áý∞¶ý∞Çý∞öý∞≤ý±áý∞ï ý∞öý∞§ý∞øý∞ïý∞øý∞≤ý∞™ý∞°ý∞üý∞Ç ý∞Ü ý∞úý∞üý±çý∞üý±Åý∞ïý±Å ý∞¨ý∞æý∞óý∞æ ý∞Öý∞≤ý∞µý∞æý∞üý±àý∞®ý∞üý±çý∞üý±Åý∞Çý∞¶ý∞ø. ý∞≤ý∞ïý±çý∞∑ý±çý∞Øý∞æý∞®ý∞øý∞ïý∞ø ý∞öý±áý∞∞ý±Åý∞µý∞óý∞æ ý∞µý±Üý∞≥ý±çý∞≤ý∞ø ý∞°ý±Äý∞≤ý∞æý∞™ý∞°ý∞üý∞Ç ý∞µý∞∞ý±Åý∞∏ý∞óý∞æ ý∞áý∞¶ý∞ø ý∞Æý±Çý∞°ý±ãý∞∏ý∞æý∞∞ý∞ø. 13 ý∞™ý∞∞ý±Åý∞óý±Åý∞≤ ý∞§ý±áý∞°ý∞æý∞§ý±ã ý∞Æý±Çý∞°ý±ã ý∞Æý±çý∞Øý∞æý∞öý±ç‚Äåý∞®ý±Å ý∞ïý±Çý∞°ý∞æ ý∞™ý±çý∞∞ý∞§ý±çý∞Øý∞∞ý±çý∞•ý∞øý∞ïý∞ø ý∞ïý±ãý∞≤ý±çý∞™ý±ãý∞Øý∞øý∞Çý∞¶ý∞ø. ý∞ìý∞™ý±Üý∞®ý∞∞ý±çý∞≤ý±Å ý∞§ý∞™ý±çý∞™ ý∞Ü ý∞úý∞üý±çý∞üý±Åý∞≤ý±ã ý∞áý∞Çý∞ïý±Üý∞µý∞∞ý±Ç ý∞®ý∞æý∞£ý±çý∞Øý∞Æý±àý∞® ý∞¨ý±çý∞Øý∞æý∞üý±çý∞∏ý±ç‚Äåý∞Æý±Üý∞®ý±ç ý∞≤ý±áý∞®ý∞üý±çý∞üý±Å ý∞ïý∞®ý∞øý∞™ý∞øý∞∏ý±çý∞§ý±ãý∞Çý∞¶ý∞ø. ý∞µý∞æý∞∞ý∞øý∞¶ý±çý∞¶ý∞∞ý±Ç ý∞Öý∞µý±Åý∞üý±àý∞§ý±á.. ý∞§ý∞Æ ý∞úý∞üý±çý∞üý±Åý∞®ý±Å ý∞Ü ý∞¶ý±áý∞µý±Åý∞°ý±Å ý∞ïý±Çý∞°ý∞æ ý∞ïý∞æý∞™ý∞æý∞°ý∞≤ý±áý∞°ý∞®ý±á ý∞µý∞øý∞∑ý∞Øý∞æý∞®ý±çý∞®ý∞ø ý∞Æý∞∞ý±ãý∞∏ý∞æý∞∞ý∞ø ý∞∞ý±Åý∞úý±Åý∞µý±Å ý∞öý±áý∞∏ý±Åý∞ïý±Åý∞Çý∞¶ý∞ø

en.title: Jhoom - Episode 2 | Hit & Run - LL44 | Marathi Webseries | @Bira 91 Merch Store #bhadipa #bira91boom
en.description:
Though Gaurav is all excited for his first drink with Reva, destiny has other plans in store for him. How does he end up drinking with his friends and what chaos leads to them landing in big trouble? Find out in this episode! The fun has just begun...
Jhoom is our new web series that takes you on a twisted journey of youth, fate, family, friends and chaos. Join along for this fun ride as we release a New Episode, every Sunday.Subscribe to BhaDiPa to get alerts on our new videos! ý§∂ý§æý§∏ý•çý§§ý•çý§∞ ý§Öý§∏ý§§ý•á ý§§ý•á !

snippet.title: Rama Rama Rama Rama Rama Nama Tarakam | Vande Guru Paramparaam | Rama Navami
snippet.description:
Part of 'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - A Spiritual Musical Series. 

Music - Composed, Produced, Directed, Recorded, Mixed, Mastered, Video Edited, Harmonium & Transliterated by Kuldeep M Pai
http://kuldeepmpai.com
http://www.youtube.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.facebook.com/kuldeepmpai
http://www.twitter.com/kuldeepmpai

Rendered by 7 little gems:
Paavani Cotah, Prakruthi. R, Nirantara Ranjeev, Maya Swaminathan, Shree. S, Sarvashri V. Madhan, Sriranjini. B 
Additional lyrics: Dr. G Suresh
Live Percussions & Melodic Arrangements : Ganapathi
Recorded at: Chith Studios
Voice Recorded at Vanajkesav Digi Audio Waves
Thanks to Senthil Prasath.   
Cinematography : Sathya
Creative Support & Translation : Sharanya Bharathwaj
Art Direction: Cool Events
Special Thanks to : Dr. Sheela Unnikrishnan, Harinie Jeevitha, Kousalya Sarangarajan,  Mridula Sivakumar, Rajadarshini Saravanan & Parents of all the little ones. 

----------‚Äê---------------------------------------------------------


Our other videos on Lord Rama:

üéµ Sri Ramachandra Kripalu -  Sooryagayathri¬Ý
Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyNSOu-Fl-k

Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jfHbBOmM0SE

üéµ Ram Govind Hari- Rahul Vellal
Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ixMvbjEUP-g

Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T6T5U7ewezU

Link: https://youtu.be/hZch8NXQa5A

¬© & ‚Ñó 2021: Kuldeep M Pai
Licensee: Chith Foundation
All rights reserved. 

'Vande Guru Paramparaam' - a spiritual musical series produced by Sri Kuldeep M Pai is a genuine attempt at infusing the abundance of our cultural heritage in the younger generations. What better agency than Music can there be to inspire the young and aged alike? A team of talented kids spearheaded by Sooryagayathri, Rahul Vellal, Bhavya Ganapathi, Raghuram Manikandan and Paavani Cotah have played their parts in transferring the Transcendental Truth through their dulcet voices. The musical videos in this series have already won acclaim from millions of viewers across the globe. It's now time for us to bow before the lineage of Gurus and relish the beatitude of divine buoyancy. Vande Guru Paramparaam! Vande Guru Paramparaam!

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 9 ‚Äì Official Hindi Trailer 2 (Universal Pictures) HD
snippet.description:
In cinemas soon!

Follow us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesIndia/ 
Find us on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/universalpicturesindia/
Follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/UniversalIND 


Genre: Action Thriller Cast: Vin Diesel, Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚Äù Bridges, John Cena, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel, with Helen Mirren and Charlize Theron Director: Justin Lin Written by: Dan Casey Based on Characters Created by: Gary Scott Thompson Producers: Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend, Samantha Vincent

No matter how fast you are, no one outruns their past.

F9 is the ninth chapter in the Fast & Furious Saga, which has endured for two decades and has earned more than $5 billion around the world.

Vin Diesel‚Äôs Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he‚Äôs going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they‚Äôve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom‚Äôs forsaken brother, Jakob (John Cena, the upcoming The Suicide Squad).

F9 sees the return of Justin Lin as director, who helmed the third, fourth, fifth and sixth chapters of the series when it transformed into a global blockbuster. The action hurtles around the globe‚Äîfrom London to Tokyo, from Central America to Edinburgh, and from a secret bunker in Azerbaijan to the teeming streets of Tbilisi. Along the way, old friends will be resurrected, old foes will return, history will be rewritten, and the true meaning of family will be tested like never before.

The film stars returning cast members Michelle Rodriguez, Tyrese Gibson, Chris ‚ÄúLudacris‚Äù Bridges, Jordana Brewster, Nathalie Emmanuel and Sung Kang, with Oscar¬Æ winner Helen Mirren and Oscar¬Æ winner Charlize Theron. F9 also features Grammy-winning superstar Cardi B as new franchise character Leysa, a woman with a connection to Dom‚Äôs past, and a cameo by Reggaeton sensation Ozuna.

F9 is produced by Neal H. Moritz, Vin Diesel, Jeff Kirschenbaum, Joe Roth, Justin Lin, Clayton Townsend and Samantha Vincent.

Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 4 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

snippet.title: Gokuldham ý§Æý•áý§Ç ý§≤ý§°ý§ºý§æý§à ý§ïý§æ ý§Æý§æý§πý•åý§≤ | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | Mini Episodes | Webisodes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the mini-episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7YXlq18P_6laPNbm0MuqEuG

About The Show:
----------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Gun Warga - Harvy Sandhu (Official Video) | Gurlez Akhtar | Desi Crew | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
New Punjabi Song 2021 - Gun Warga
Listen to on all audio streaming platforms: https://harvysandhu.bfan.link/gun-warga.yde

The quintessential Punjabi machismo shines in Harvy Sandhu's latest track  'Gun Warga'. Featuring music by the famous Desi Crew and featuring vocals by the amazing Gurlez Akhtar, the track will surely make you jump with energy. 

Track credits:
Song: Gun Warga
Singer: Harvy Sandhu
Music: Desi Crew
Lyrics: Jeet Kamal Kuhliwala
Video: Tru Team
Mix & Master: Sameer Charegoankar
Female Lead: Isha Sharma
Dop: Shoeb Siddiqui
Edit & DI: Garry Khatrao Media
Publicity Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Photography: Harnam Singh
Special Thanks: Sanjeev Sharma
Hair - Ravi
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Assistant Choreographer - Robin Singh
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Akshay Kapoor

Reels Promotion - Blue Apple Digital
Online Promotions - GK Digital

Follow me on:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnFacebook
Instagram: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnInstagram
Twitter: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnTwitter
Snapchat: https://bit.ly/HarvyOnSnapchat

Don't forget to subscribe to my YouTube Channel:
https://bit.ly/HarvyOnYouTube

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email: sync-india@believedigital.com

#HarvySandhu #GurlezAkhtar #GunWarga

For Licensing enquiries: 
Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

For booking enquiries:
artistbooking-india@believedigital.com


Lyrics :- 
Jione mod jiha rakhda si roab jo
vairiyan de mna vich ni
jet sky kehnda taarni aa hun kude
pyar wali jhana vich ni
heera raani de taaj vich jadya 
ni kehnda tere tann warga
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

peen jatti diya sonha utte chobar 
ve gla vicho zaan sukkiyan 
suit hunde ne import ve lahore ton
te saudi walon aun juttiyan
jinne listan ch aunde ne greek god
lainde ne dream saak de
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

teri gallan diyan gallan rahe karda
jado khull jande datt ni
jehra khara vi na paave laal pari ch
oh laaliyan ne liya patt ni
kehnda nattiyan pva lu oh ch tere layi
si baapu jehra kann fadd da....
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

kala mole ve jatti di gori gall te
nazran ton raakhi karda
kaale rang da paranda bacha naag da
ve zehar wangu jaave charhda
jeet kuhliwale utte ho gaye parche
nitt hunde ne khadaak ve.....
fail jatti de husan agge sohniya 
iran diyan hooran aakhde

saah lain vi ni dinda ea bullet nu 
ni gedi utte gedi rakhda
kitte chakkya na jaave putt jatt da
ni billo tera time chakkda
teri takkni kaleja billo thaar ta
jo tappda si sun warga,
munda sinn ke akhan naa kudde suttgi
ni webley di gun warga

snippet.title: Want Stable Mental Health? Take Charge Of Your Feelings | Gaur Gopal Das
snippet.description: Have any of you ever felt upset because someone said something unpleasant or did something wrong to you? Have any of you felt helpless, frustrated and even angry in your dealings with someone? Has your mind ever become disturbed because of someone‚Äôs inappropriate behaviour? And no matter what, people don‚Äôt even change. And we continue to remain perpetual victims. How can one come out of such a predicament? How can one deal with such situations and maintain stable mental health ? Take a look!

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 16 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara‚Äôs birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can‚Äôt tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

Episode 3146 : Is Popatlal's Wedding Fixed?
---------------------------------------------------------
Pooja finally arrives at the Gokuldham Society and Popatlal has arranged a lavish welcome for her. Upon arrival, Popatlal introduces Pooja to everyone and everyone to Pooja. He then takes Pooja to his house and introduces her to the ladies of Gokuldham society Watch the full episode now.

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Shakti | ý§∂ý§ïý•çý§§ý§ø | Episode 1222 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Soumya's encounter with the man claiming to be Harman is interrupted when she gets a distressing call from Heer. Catch what happens next in this sneak peek from the coming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.description:

Lyrics
Main sochda aa k mar jawa 
Kuj kar jawa par marna nai main ‚Äú 
Mere dil vich teria yaadaan nu khfa karna nai main ‚Äú 
Tenu farq rta nai paina 
mera kakh v nai hun rehna 
Meri chaldi jindgi ne 
O aakhar saona c 
Main rona e c ‚Äò eh hona c dukh mere pallhe tu paona c 

Akhaan cho hanju sukk gye 
Jive saagra vichle paaani 
Hun jehar lagdia thaawan mainu 
Jithe jindgi maani 
Main tere pishe umar gawali
Tenu vakh hon di kaahli 
Mere pyar de jakhmaan te loon tu laona e c 
Main rona c ‚Äú ‚Äú‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù‚Äù

Othe na kadraan payiaa 
Mainu tang kardiaa gallha oh 
Jo jaan lagge ne kahiaa
Dil tuttea tuttea tuttea 
Haye sb kuj mera luttea 
Main seh lya oh ilzaam 
Mere sir aona e c

Mainu pta c reha nai jana 
Taithon alwida keha nai jana 
Laaparwahi Beparwahi 
Ban de aaye ishq tabaahi 
Eh milne di taang 
Khaadiaan oh soha di c
Chal jo v c 
Galti doha di c

About Sathiyam News :
Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam‚Äôs biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. We believe that a decision made by individuals in the society who have access to information that is truthful and unbiased has the potential to impact and change the society at large. All the broadcasts of Sathiyam Television will express news in a manner that is true, integral, understandable and devoid of sensationalism or slander of any kind. All broadcasts of Sathiyam Television have a singular focus of arming the viewer with the truth that would empower them to make a decision by themselves. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam‚Äôs biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Sathiyam a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

As for DTH, Sathiyam is available in all leading DTH & other OTT  platforms  Sathiyam TV is also available for viewership in the Bangalore, Mysore, Hubli & Dharwad areas of Karnataka and in Mumbai & Kolkata through terrestrial means, apart from a 24X7 web streaming at www.sathiyam.tv

Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.
